title: DraftedChangeView
description: Callers that inspect a drafted change need read access to persisted state without receiving a mutable `Change` aggregate. `DraftedChangeView` extends [`core:read-only-change-view`](read-only-change-view/spec.md) for changes with `isDrafted === true`. It is constructed by the repository or `GetDraft` and MUST NOT expose mutating `Change` methods or the underlying entity instance.
context: Callers that inspect a drafted change need read access to persisted state without receiving a mutable `Change` aggregate. `DraftedChangeView` extends [`core:read-only-change-view`](read-only-change-view/spec.md) for changes with `isDrafted === true`. It is constructed by the repository or `GetDraft` and MUST NOT expose mutating `Change` methods or the underlying entity instance.

rules: `DraftedChangeView` MUST extend `ReadOnlyChangeView` with all shared read accessors defined there.

`DraftedChangeView` MUST additionally expose:

- `isDrafted` — MUST be `true` for every instance

rules.requirement: No escape hatch to mutable Change
rules: Implementations MUST satisfy the shared rule in [`core:read-only-change-view`](read-only-change-view/spec.md): no public accessor returns the wrapped `Change`. Only infrastructure inside `ChangeRepository` / `mutateDraft` may hold the mutable aggregate.

Only `ChangeRepository` (or test doubles of the port) and `GetDraft` MAY construct `DraftedChangeView` instances from a persisted drafted change, using `toDraftedChangeView` from the shared inspection module.

Callers MUST obtain views through `getDraft`, `listDrafts`, or `GetDraft.execute`, not by instantiating the type against arbitrary in-memory `Change` objects in production code.

Loading artifact file content for a drafted change remains the responsibility of `ChangeRepository.artifact` and related port methods when explicitly invoked with the correct drafted storage context. `DraftedChangeView` itself MUST NOT include artifact body content in the view type.

constraints: DraftedChangeView is not a replacement for the Change entity in the domain model; it is a narrowed projection for drafted storage.
Terminology in this spec uses Draft / Drafted, not "shelved".

scenarios.name: View exposes shared read accessors
given: a drafted change parked-feature with two specIds
then: view.name is parked-feature
AND view.specIds has length 2
AND view.schemaName and view.schemaVersion match the manifest

scenarios.name: View exposes artifact aggregate state
given: a drafted change whose proposal artifact is pending-review
then: view.artifacts includes the proposal entry with that persisted state
AND no artifact file body is present on the view

scenarios.name: Mutating Change methods are not on the view type
when: TypeScript types for DraftedChangeView are inspected
then: transition, updateSpecIds, and discard are not members of the interface

scenarios.name: View exposes isDrafted true
given: a change drafted with a drafted event as the latest lifecycle marker
then: view.isDrafted === true

scenarios.name: Active change cannot become a DraftedChangeView
given: an active change under changes/ with isDrafted === false
then: it throws before returning a view

scenarios.name: View has no transition method at runtime
when: a test attempts to call transition on the object
then: the call is a type error or the method is undefined at runtime

scenarios.requirement: No escape hatch to mutable Change
scenarios.name: No unwrap accessor on getDraft result
then: view has no change, unwrap, or toChange accessor

scenarios.requirement: No escape hatch to mutable Change
scenarios.name: listDrafts entries are views only
then: every element satisfies DraftedChangeView
AND no element is a domain Change instance

scenarios.requirement: No escape hatch to mutable Change
scenarios.name: Production callers use repository factories
then: it returns toDraftedChangeView(loadedChange) rather than the raw Change

scenarios.name: GetDraft returns a view
given: a change exists only under drafts/
then: result.view satisfies DraftedChangeView

scenarios.name: getDraft returns null for active-only name
given: a change exists only under changes/
then: it returns null

scenarios.name: GetDraft does not call get on active storage first for resolution
given: a spy on ChangeRepository.get and getDraft
when: GetDraft.execute({ name }) runs for a drafted-only name
then: getDraft is invoked
AND get is not used as a fallback that returns a Change to callers

scenarios.name: View does not embed file bodies from getDraft
given: drafted proposal.md exists on disk with non-empty content
then: the view does not include proposal.md text

scenarios.name: View does not embed file bodies from listDrafts
when: listDrafts() returns views for changes with artifacts
then: no view object contains artifact file content strings

scenarios.name: Artifact load remains explicit via repository
when: ChangeRepository.artifact is invoked for that drafted change
then: file content is returned separately from the view load path
